    SondowMainCheckedCodeBridge.SondowProjectMonth9Month10InternalPudlakWitnessSurface.InternalPudlakTheorem5ScaleData}
  (input :

      scale_data)

  (hrat : is_rational euler_mascheroni),
  (input.toSearchInput.toProofLengthAxiomFreeCheckedUpperProvider upper_provider).computedCollisionNOfRationality hrat =
    max
      (SondowMainCheckedCodeBridge.SondowProjectMonth12UnconditionalPAHilbertInternalizationSurface.checkedSearchUpperTail
          input.toSearchInput.toProofLengthFreeMonth12Candidate upper_provider hrat).upperN

          (SondowMainCheckedCodeBridge.SondowProjectMonth12UnconditionalPAHilbertInternalizationSurface.checkedSearchUpperTail
              input.toSearchInput.toProofLengthFreeMonth12Candidate upper_provider hrat).U
          ⋯).threshold
